case_meta.ps: Rajouri Garden Police Station, West Delhi
case_meta.data_requested_by: SI Harpreet Singh, Rajouri Garden PS
case_meta.data_issued_by: Nodal Officer, Airtel / Jio / Vi / BSNL

crime_timeline.event: Planning call – Suspect Primary to Associate (312 sec)
Final planning day – multiple calls & encrypted WA sessions
VICTIM last active call – Arjun Mehta to father (78 sec)
VICTIM PHONE GOES SILENT – missed call from father not answered
Ransom negotiator SIM gets first SMS from Burner1
Suspect Primary + Associate co-located at HR-VI-001 (Gurugram hideout)
FIRST RANSOM CALL – 847 sec (14 min) to Rajesh Mehta from tower DL-JIO-003
Suspects on NH-48 Kherki Daula – all 3 on HR-VI-002
SECOND RANSOM CALL – 1247 sec (20 min) from DL-JIO-003
THIRD RANSOM CALL – 312 sec from DL-JIO-004 (suspect mobile)

key_forensic_findings.title: IMEI cross-SIM linkage destroys burner anonymity
key_forensic_findings.detail: IMEI 357890123456789 is shared between SUSPECT_BURNER1 (7011238456/Jio) and SUSPECT_PRIMARY (9811045723/Airtel). Both SIMs used in same physical handset (Samsung Galaxy A54). This makes the burner SIM traceable back to the main suspect. Query: SELECT msisdn, imei FROM cdr WHERE imei='357890123456789' GROUP BY msisdn

key_forensic_findings.title: Victim + Primary Suspect co-located at DL-AIR-001 during kidnapping window
key_forensic_findings.detail: Tower dump DL-AIR-001 (07:30–09:00) shows MSISDN 9910456781 (victim) and 9811045723 (suspect) both active. Victim silent after 08:22. Suspect continues active = physical co-location at crime scene.

key_forensic_findings.title: Ransom SIM (9899456012) linked to SUSPECT_BURNER1 via CDR
key_forensic_findings.detail: Within 14 minutes of each ransom call, SUSPECT_BURNER1 (7011238456) called RANSOM_NEGOTIATOR (9899456012). Pattern repeats on all 3 ransom call days. Indirect link: Primary → Burner1 → Ransom SIM → Victim Father.

key_forensic_findings.title: Ransom SIM Google Maps session 4 minutes before each ransom call
key_forensic_findings.detail: IPDR shows RANSOM_NEGOTIATOR data session to maps.google.com (dst_ip: 142.250.195.142, port 443) approximately 3-4 minutes before each ransom call. Possible real-time location scouting or checking movement of IO team.

key_forensic_findings.title: Suspect Associate (Dinesh Chauhan) has genuine KYC – real address lead
key_forensic_findings.detail: MSISDN 9654012387 (Vi Haryana) has genuine Aadhaar seeded KYC. Address: House 7, Block B, Sheetla Mata Road, Gurugram – 122001. Physical surveillance recommended. All other suspect SIMs use fake documents.

key_forensic_findings.title: IPDR WhatsApp large upload at NH-48 tower (HR-VI-002) = possible live location share
key_forensic_findings.detail: 445,000 bytes uplink in 60-min WhatsApp session at HR-VI-002 (16:00 on Mar 15). Unusually high uplink for messaging = likely sending images/video or live location. Request WhatsApp LEA data for account linked to IP session.

key_forensic_findings.title: Suspect Driver (Ramesh Prasad) has genuine KYC – second real address lead
key_forensic_findings.detail: MSISDN 9711234560, Jio Delhi, genuine Aadhaar. Address: Jhuggi Cluster, R-Block, Uttam Nagar. Present at kidnapping origin tower and hideout tower. Second physical arrest target.

key_forensic_findings.title: Ransom SIM activated 5 days before crime = premeditated planning
key_forensic_findings.detail: MSISDN 9899456012 activated 2024-03-10 (5 days before kidnapping). Only used for ransom calls. Activation retailer: JIO-RET-DL-019234, North West Delhi – may have CCTV footage of buyer.

suggested_tool_test_queries.query: SELECT msisdn, imsi, imei, operator, activation_date FROM CAF WHERE imei = '357890123456789'
suggested_tool_test_queries.expected_result: Returns 2 rows (Burner1 + Primary) – same IMEI, different operators

suggested_tool_test_queries.query: Find all MSISDNs present in BOTH dump DL-AIR-001 (07:30-09:00 Mar 15) AND HR-VI-001 (09:30-13:00 Mar 15)
suggested_tool_test_queries.expected_result: Returns Suspect Primary + Suspect Driver – proves both were at crime scene and hideout

suggested_tool_test_queries.query: SELECT msisdn, call_datetime, serving_lac, serving_ci, serving_bts_address FROM CDR WHERE msisdn='9811045723' AND call_date='2024-03-15' ORDER BY call_datetime
For MSISDN 9811045723 on 2024-03-15, list all CDR voice calls and IPDR data sessions, sorted by time – show gaps
suggested_tool_test_queries.expected_result: Reveals WhatsApp sessions filling every gap between calls = encrypted messaging pattern

suggested_tool_test_queries.query: Find MSISDNs that called BOTH 9811045723 (Primary) AND 9899456012 (Ransom) within any 30-minute window
From CDR: find all calls TO 9810001234 (victim father) from numbers NOT in his regular contact history, duration > 300 sec
For RANSOM_NEGOTIATOR (9899456012): list all IPDR sessions sorted by time; calculate time delta to next CDR voice call
suggested_tool_test_queries.expected_result: Google Maps session → 3-4 min gap → ransom call. Repeats 3 times.

suggested_tool_test_queries.query: Calculate approximate speed from CDR tower timestamps: DL-AIR-003 (09:00) to HR-VI-001 (09:30). Tower distance ~21 km in 30 min
suggested_tool_test_queries.expected_result: ~42 km/h – consistent with Delhi traffic, vehicle movement confirmed

suggested_tool_test_queries.query: SELECT msisdn, name, kyc_doc_type, kyc_status, activation_date FROM CAF WHERE kyc_status='FAKE'
suggested_tool_test_queries.expected_result: Returns 4 suspect SIMs including ransom negotiator

suggested_tool_test_queries.query: CDR call frequency between 9811045723 and 9654012387 in 7 days before crime vs 7 days before that
suggested_tool_test_queries.expected_result: Sharp spike in last 7 days = unusual communication pattern, planning indicator
